title: Fairytales SMP
description: A modpack that aims to improve performance and the experience for players on the Fairytales SMP Minecraft server!
body:
![Fairytales SMP Mod Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813227c0038916878cd3815ce11b1c98b337d567_0.webp)
### ♡ Mod Pack Features:
- Performance optimisation mods to improve gameplay experience
- Player heads next to chat messages
- Shader integration
- Fullbright
- Shulker box tool tips
- Mini map
- Nametag tweaks
- Auto copy screenshots
- Connected textures
- Other helpful QOL tweaks
